title: Asparagopsis spinescens
taxonomy: Asparagopsis spinescens is a species of red algae in the family Corallinaceae. It belongs to the genus Asparagopsis, which is part of the order Corallinales. The family Corallinaceae is a group of coralline red algae, characterized by their calcified cell walls. Asparagopsis spinescens is a marine species found in tropical and subtropical waters around the world. It is classified as a species of algae, specifically a type of coralline red algae.
